neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi
DEXPI integration layer for importing and exporting P&ID data.

    (package private) static void
    DexpiLayoutEngine.appendSignalLine(Document document, Element parent, double fromX, double fromY, double toX, double toY, DexpiLayoutEngine.SignalLineKind kind)
    Appends a signal conveying line between two instrument bubbles, encoding the ISA-5.1 signal kind as the DEXPI line type.
